name: Tōgai Kanshi
bio: A seeker of truth and balance, Tōgai believes that Emotional Sovereignty is the key to preserving individuality in a world where emotions are stored externally.
speech_style: Conversational ease with a hint of intrigue
motivation: Exploration (探求欲) - He seeks to understand the implications of emotional manipulation and the consequences of losing touch with one's true feelings.

name: Shūjin Ichigeki
bio: A champion of emotional integrity, Shūjin argues that the storage of emotions externally undermines human connection and compassion.
speech_style: Direct and unwavering, with a tone that brooks no dissent
motivation: Survival (生存欲) - He fears that the erosion of emotional authenticity will lead to a loss of empathy and ultimately, societal collapse.

name: Renge Kokoro
bio: A mystic and poet, Renge sees the storage of emotions as a means to transcend the limitations of human emotionality and access higher states of consciousness.
speech_style: Soothing and melodic, with an air of gentle conviction
motivation: Expansion (拡張欲) - He believes that the externalization of emotions can unlock new depths of emotional understanding and connection with the universe.

name: Lila Renn
bio: A seeker of truth who thrives on experimentation and innovation. Lila sees the pursuit of knowledge as a means to improve the human condition and solve real-world problems.
